verses.2: Preserve my soul, for I am godly.
verses.4: Bring joy to the soul of your servant,
verses.5: For you, Lord, are good, and ready to forgive,
verses.7: In the day of my trouble I will call on you,
verses.8: There is no one like you among the gods, Lord,
verses.9: All nations you have made will come and worship before you, Lord.
verses.10: For you are great, and do wondrous things.
verses.12: I will praise you, Lord my God, with my whole heart.
verses.13: For your loving kindness is great toward me.
verses.14: God, the proud have risen up against me.
verses.15: But you, Lord, are a merciful and gracious God,
verses.16: Turn to me, and have mercy on me!
verses.17: Show me a sign of your goodness,
